question_text: A household appliance consumes 2000 joules of electrical energy in 4 seconds. Calculate the power rating of this appliance.
explanation: Power measures how quickly energy is used. We calculate it using P = E ÷ t, where E is energy in joules and t is time in seconds. Here, the appliance uses 2000 joules in 4 seconds, so P = 2000 ÷ 4 = 500 W. This means the appliance transfers 500 joules of energy every second.
